rationale: Maine SOS-assigned registration/charter number of the existing mark being amended.

label_verbatim: 1. TEXT - list word(s) protected in the original registration, if any
rationale: Recital of existing protected text words. Read-only recital (§1525-A prohibits amending the mark itself); fill should mirror the original registration.

label_verbatim: 2. FEATURES - describe in detail the design protected in the original registration, if any
rationale: Recital of existing protected design features. Read-only recital.
Type of mark — values from MARK-1 §C (Trademark / Service Mark / Collective Mark). Captured as free text since the form provides a single text field rather than checkboxes.

label_verbatim: Original type of mark, if changed (free-text recital line above the yes/no checkboxes)
rationale: Full-width line at y 323-342, immediately above the yes/no checkbox row at y 273-290. Used to record the prior type-of-mark value when type is being amended (i.e., when Check Box4 = yes). Reviewer corrected drafter's mapping (drafter mapped this to mark.type_changed which is captured by the boolean checkboxes below — Text mark3Five is a free-text recital line, not the boolean answer).

label_verbatim: Sub-question text field at y 298-317 between the type-of-mark and the yes/no checkbox row
rationale: Small text widget (rect ~131x18pt) wedged between mark3Four (TYPE OF MARK) and the Check Box4/5 yes/no row. Most likely a continuation/explanation prompt for the type-of-mark change. Reviewer added this widget — drafter omitted it from field_mappings (95.5% coverage → 100% with this addition). Confidence is 'low' pending visual confirmation; key is provisional.

label_verbatim: [ ] yes — The type of mark indicated represents an amendment from that appearing on the original registration
rationale: First option in the mutually-exclusive yes/no for whether the type of mark is being amended. Boolean true → 'yes'.
Second option ('no').

Single Nice classification class being added/deleted by this amendment. Per page-0 instruction 'Attach additional pages, if necessary' (Check Box8), multi-class amendments use an attached exhibit rather than additional inline rows.
First option in the mutually-exclusive Added/Deleted action. Enum value 'deleted'.
Second option ('added').

label_verbatim: DESCRIBE goods manufactured or sold and/or the service that is provided
rationale: Description of goods/services for the class being added (only required when amendment.class_action='added').

label_verbatim: DESCRIBE manner in which mark is applied to the goods or used to promote their sale and/or the manner in which the mark is used in connection with the service — line 1
rationale: First line of the manner-of-use description for the new class. Three-line widget primitive (Text13/Text14/Text15); synth concatenates non-empty lines for the canonical value.
Second line of the manner-of-use description. See mark3Thirteen.
Third line of the manner-of-use description. See mark3Thirteen.
Boolean opt-in flagging that an additional-pages exhibit is attached (used when amending multiple classes since the form has only one inline class row).

Signer printed name + capacity (e.g., 'Jane Doe, Owner' or 'John Smith, President'). Same key family as MARK-1's mark.signer.printed_name_and_capacity — Shape D under the mark.* namespace, not filing.signer.* (mark filings keep their signer keys under mark.* per 10 MRSA Title 10 separation from entity-formation 13-C/31 MRSA forms). Reviewer corrected drafter's filing.signer.printed_name_and_capacity mapping.

Owner identity as it appears on the registered mark — 'Myself' for individual owners, or firm/association/corporate name for entity owners. Same key as MARK-1. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.name mapping (mark filings keep applicant identity under mark.applicant.* not entity.* — a mark owner is not necessarily a registered Maine entity).

label_verbatim: (Mailing Address, City, State and Zip Code)
rationale: Owner's mailing address (single combined widget on this form). Same key as MARK-1. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.mailing_address.
Mutually-exclusive applicant-type 'individual'. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.type to mark.applicant.entity_type per MARK-1 precedent.
Mutually-exclusive 'general_partnership'.
Mutually-exclusive 'limited_partnership'.
Mutually-exclusive 'corporation'.
Mutually-exclusive 'association'. Unnamed widget at rect [68.1, 534.5, 85.6, 550.6] — empty field_id is preserved upstream; fill engine matches by rect/widget index.
Mutually-exclusive 'union'.
Mutually-exclusive 'other' (requires mark.applicant.entity_type_other_explanation).
Free-text explanation when entity_type='other'. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.type_other_description.
Home jurisdiction (state) — required when applicant.entity_type implies a registered entity. Same key as MARK-1. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.home_jurisdiction.
Date the applicant entity was organized in its home jurisdiction. Same key as MARK-1. Reviewer corrected drafter's entity.formation_date.
Date of the amendment application (matches the universal filing.date_signed key from cover-letter primitive — same convention as MARK-1).

label_verbatim: Name of entity(s) on the submitted filings [1]
rationale: Cover-letter row 1 (cover-letter primitive).

widget_id: Name of entitys on the submitted filings 2
rationale: Cover-letter row 2. Field-id has typo 'entitys' (no apostrophe) preserved upstream.

label_verbatim: Hold attested copy for pick up
rationale: Expedite tier 'hold_for_pickup'.
Expedite tier '24h_next_business_day'.
Expedite tier 'immediate_same_day'. Unnamed widget at rect [68.7, 585.8, 90.3, 606.3] — empty field_id is preserved upstream.
Total fees (per page-0 header — typically $50 amendment fee + expedite premium; confirm against current SOS fee schedule).
Filing-contact name.
Filing-contact phone.

widget_id: Contact email address for this filing
rationale: Filing-specific contact email.

widget_id: Email address to use for annual report reminders
label_verbatim: (Email address to use for annual report reminders)
rationale: Annual-report reminder email — note: trademark registrations do not have annual reports, but the cover letter is shared across SOS divisions. Field may be left blank for mark filings (same convention as MARK-1).
Recipient name.
Recipient firm.
Recipient street.
Recipient city/state/zip combined. Field-id has double-space ('City State  Zip') preserved upstream.
